allowed_files: READ-ONLY — no writes to any production file
purpose: End-to-end verification that TP/SL, sizing, held-side pricing, close logic, and bankroll/accounting all agree and work correctly as a system. This is the integration test of all prior phases. No code is changed — the job is to produce documented evidence that the system is correct or to surface remaining gaps.

in_scope: Query live DB at runtime/trades_sports.db for open/closed trade data
Observe dashboard at localhost:8900 — read /api/state endpoint output
Read all spec docs produced by phases 1-4 in 08_SHARED_CONTEXT/

tp_sl_verification.method: Read core/risk.py — confirm get_tp_price() and get_sl_price() (or equivalent canonical functions) exist and are called by check_exit(). If phase 1 added them, confirm they are in use.
tp_sl_verification.pass_condition: Single canonical TP/SL price functions exist and are the only source of those values

tp_sl_verification.method: Read .env, read core/risk.py constants. Confirm AUTO_TAKE_PROFIT_PCT=0.40, AUTO_STOP_LOSS_PCT=0.12, NEAR_RESOLUTION_PRICE=0.97, TRAILING_STOP_ACTIVATE_PCT=0.10, TRAILING_STOP_DRAWDOWN_PCT=0.12
tp_sl_verification.pass_condition: All 5 values match between .env and code

tp_sl_verification.method: List all exit reasons returned by check_exit(). Confirm each has a log statement and DB persistence in bot_core.py.
tp_sl_verification.pass_condition: No exit reason is silently dropped

sizing_verification.method: Read SIZING_RULES_SPEC_001.md from 08_SHARED_CONTEXT. Read core/paper_exec.py. Confirm formula matches.
Read core/paper_exec.py and core/risk.py. Confirm per-trade and per-session size caps are enforced.
sizing_verification.pass_condition: All caps confirmed present and non-bypassable

held_side_pricing_verification.method: Grep core/risk.py, core/paper_exec.py, bot_core.py, dashboard_server.py for any use of bid_yes, bid_no, yes_price, no_price in equity/PnL calculations. Every use must be via _held_bid() or equivalent held-side accessor.
held_side_pricing_verification.pass_condition: Zero raw bid_yes/bid_no used in equity or PnL math

held_side_pricing_verification.method: Read check_exit() in core/risk.py line 177-179. Confirm that None _held_bid returns are now accompanied by a WARNING log per EXECUTION_RISK_MONITOR_001.
held_side_pricing_verification.pass_condition: Empty OB produces a logged WARNING, not silent skip

bankroll_verification.method: Query DB: SELECT SUM(pnl_usd) FROM trades WHERE status='closed'. Compare to /api/state lifetime_bankroll - INITIAL_BANKROLL. They must agree within $0.01.
bankroll_verification.pass_condition: DB realized PnL equals dashboard realized PnL

bankroll_verification.method: Read /api/state. Confirm available_cash = lifetime_bankroll - capital_committed (not including unrealized).
Read /api/state live_equity field. Confirm it is derived from held-side bid prices, not market mid-prices.
bankroll_verification.pass_condition: live_equity derivation uses held-side bid only

close_logic_verification.method: Confirm bot_core.py includes the resolved_markets force-close path from RESOLUTION_WATCHER_INTEGRATE_001. Confirm it logs at INFO with reason=market_resolved.
Read bot_core.py cooldown block. Confirm: near_resolution=600s, stop_loss=1800s, gap_stop=3600s. Confirm take_profit, trailing_stop, time_exit, market_resolved have no cooldown.
close_logic_verification.pass_condition: Exactly 3 cooldown assignments, all with correct durations

verify_report_must_include: Results table: check_id | result (PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL) | evidence | file:line
Recommended fixes for any PARTIAL or FAIL checks before phase 6
Overall verdict: SYSTEM VERIFIED | PARTIAL | GAPS REMAIN

preflight_questions: Is the bot currently running (check runtime/launcher.pid)?
Are SIZING_RULES_SPEC_001.md and BANKROLL_ACCOUNTING_SPEC_001.md available in 08_SHARED_CONTEXT/?
acceptance_criteria: All verification checks produce a PASS or documented PARTIAL
Zero checks produce FAIL without explanation
DB realized PnL agrees with dashboard within $0.01
No raw bid_yes/bid_no found in equity/PnL calculations
RISK_VERIFY_REPORT_001.md written with complete evidence table
proof_of_work: Show DB query output for SUM(pnl_usd)
Show /api/state JSON snapshot (redact sensitive fields if needed)
Show grep output confirming no raw bid_yes/bid_no in equity math
Show exact code lines for each PASS check
guardrails: Do not reintroduce ambiguous YES/NO economics
Held-side contract truth must remain the basis for pricing and exit logic
Distinguish clearly: VERIFIED | PARTIAL | BLOCKED | SUPERSEDED
